description: This video promotes International Women's Day by encouraging women to explore cryptocurrency. It highlights Binance Academy's courses and a giveaway of $25 to 5,000 women who complete a short course. The discussion emphasizes the cautious approach women may have towards crypto and the importance of education in this new venture.
topic_summary: Celebrating International Women's Day, the video encourages women to engage with cryptocurrency and highlights educational resources available through Binance Academy. It features a giveaway to incentivize participation and discusses the unique challenges women face in the crypto space [t=50:46].
